subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! The Wronged One, Who hath chosen for Himself neither will nor desire but hath embraced the Will, maketh mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رضا یذکرک المظلوم الذی مااختار لنفسه اراده و لا مشیه و اختار اراده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Manifestation of God does not act of own volition
